# OTTv

> OTTv is a premium IPTV subscription service with 24,000+ live channels and 120,000+ movies & series in HD & 4K, available in 50+ countries. One subscription works on every device. Founded by Maurisio Torres. Backed by a 7-day money-back guarantee with no auto-renewal.

## Key facts
- Service: Premium IPTV subscription (live TV + VOD)
- Channels: 24,000+ live channels
- VOD library: 120,000+ movies and series
- Quality: HD and 4K streaming
- Setup time: ~5 minutes
- Guarantee: 7-day money-back, no auto-renewal
- Countries served: 50+
- Subscribers: 50,000+
- Rating: 4.8/5 from 12,400 reviews
- Pricing: from $7.50/month (annual plan)
- Payment: Cards, PayPal, crypto
- Support: WhatsApp +44 7848 197761, Help@ottv.org
- Founder: Maurisio Torres

## Pages

- [Home](https://ottv.org/): Overview, plans, what is IPTV, testimonials
- [IPTV Subscription Plans](https://ottv.org/iptv-subscription): 1/3/6/12-month pricing, comparison table, buying guide
- [IPTV Free Trial](https://ottv.org/iptv-free-trial): 24-hour and 7-day trial information, eligibility
- [FAQ](https://ottv.org/faq): 29 questions covering basics, OTTv specifics, trial, pricing, activation, devices, support
- [About](https://ottv.org/about): Founder Maurisio Torres, company story, principles
- [Contact](https://ottv.org/contact): WhatsApp, email, contact form, support routes
- [Refund Policy](https://ottv.org/refund-policy): 7-day money-back guarantee terms, claim flow, exclusions
- [Terms of Service](https://ottv.org/terms): Acceptance, billing, no auto-renewal, governing law (England & Wales)
- [Privacy Policy](https://ottv.org/privacy): GDPR/UK GDPR/CCPA compliance, data collection table, retention
- [Disclaimer](https://ottv.org/disclaimer): Third-party content, no copyrighted hosting, user jurisdiction responsibility

## Brand
- Domain: ottv.org
- Brand name: OTTv
- Tagline: One IPTV subscription, every device, 50+ countries
- Last updated: 2026-05-02
